{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Seisha's drudge
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] has a [[drudge]] that is a [[Soulsmith]] [[construct]] made of [[madra]] [[Forged]] according to a particular pattern.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] has a [[drudge]] that floats over her shoulder.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
